reviews.name: Yennifer Sutraban
reviews.comment:
First of all, amazing dental office located in Jamaica ave. I had pain in wisdom tooth, originally went to city md few days before and gotten pain meds and antibiotics but that’s about it that urgent care can do. I called TCN dental immediately after my urgent care visits then I went to TCN dental  during the week of Christmas 2025. December 24, 2025 ,  I was able to get check up and was scheduled December 26, 2025 same week for removal extraction of wisdom tooth. After that procedure I had some pain 2-3 days, I follow rules by eating soft food and applesauce. Pain wears off by day 5. I ate regular food on other side of tooth. They did an amazing job.they did charge me $500 for bone graft but I didn’t mind as I had pain and wanted it to be over . Insurance covered everything else.

On January 9, 2026 I called TCN dental because of a root canal they told me needed to get done. The tooth that was bothering me, I got scheduled same day, I went in wait time was close to hour but that’s was because I was an emergency case. Root canal done and only crown is left to be put on another day. After this procedure some soreness and pressure and sensitivity. I went to work after. Covered by my insurance.The dentist DR Edward shalomov is amazing.

reviews.comment:
I'm very grateful to Dr. Campos for her meticulous work during my deep cleaning—zero sensitivity, and everything went smoothly, as always. The whole experience was friendly and professional.

I sometimes read reviews and wonder where people get such negative experiences at this office, which I've been visiting with my daughter for years. I can only assume that some doctors may not work as smoothly as Dr. Buttar, Dr. Campos (who did sealants for my daughter), or Dr. Shalomoff (who placed two implants and did three root canals with crowns). I am beyond grateful to have Mercy Thomas as my dental hygienist at Guerrino Dentistry in Mount Vernon, NY. For years, she has provided nothing short of outstanding care, and each visit with her is a reminder of how lucky I am to be in such capable and compassionate hands.

Mercy consistently goes above and beyond to ensure every cleaning is not only thorough and gentle but also genuinely enjoyable. She takes her time to explain everything clearly and gives me personalized tips for maintaining optimal oral health between visits. Her advice has truly made a difference in my home care routine, and my dental health has never been better.

What truly sets Mercy apart is her warm, caring nature. She is always pleasant, polite, and incredibly kind—a true professional who genuinely cares about her patients. Not only does she provide exceptional care, but she also takes the time to connect on a personal level. She always asks about my mom, which means so much to me. It’s those thoughtful gestures that make every visit feel personal and comforting.

Mercy remembers details, checks in with genuine interest, and makes you feel completely at ease from the moment you sit in her chair. Her gentle touch, positive energy, and kindhearted spirit turn a routine dental appointment into something I actually look forward to.

Mercy Thomas is a rare gem in the dental field, and Guerrino Dentistry is incredibly fortunate to have her on their team. Her dedication, compassion, and professionalism reflect the highest standards of patient care. I cannot thank her enough for the many years of exceptional service, and I look forward to many more. (Thanks Sarah)

reviews.comment:
Not far from the bustling center of New York City, where the buildings reached for the sky and the hustle and bustle of life echoed through the streets, in the quaint town of Rosedale, nestled among the beautiful residential houses and surrounded by blossoming gardens, there stood a charming dental office. From the moment you step into the waiting area, you'll feel like you've entered  a neighbor's home. The ambiance is a perfect blend of comfort and familiarity. Soft 2016 pop music cheers you as you settle into their purple playdough chair, creating an atmosphere that eases any dental anxiety.
But it's not just about aesthetics; it's about connection. While Dr. Naseem ensures your visit is a quick touch and go, scared to bore you with technical details of oral procedures, his assistants will make every visit transcends the typical dental experience. Their caring nature and genuine interest in your well-being make appointments feel like a rendezvous with a friend rather than a routine check up. Five stars for turning scary dental visits into delightful excursion!

Review for Dr. Baketova – Dental Center of Brooklyn
I had an excellent experience with Dr. Baketova at the Dental Center of Brooklyn. From the moment I walked in, the staff was welcoming and professional. Dr. Baketova took the time to explain everything clearly, making sure I understood each step of my treatment. She is gentle, attentive, and has a very calming presence — which really helped ease my anxiety about going to the dentist.
The office is clean, modern, and well-equipped, and appointments always run on time. I appreciated how thorough Dr. Baketova was with both the exam and cleaning, and she offered helpful advice on maintaining good oral health without being pushy about unnecessary procedures.
Overall, I highly recommend Dr. Baketova and the team at the Dental Center of Brooklyn to anyone looking for a caring, knowledgeable, and skilled dentist. You can tell she truly cares about her patients’ comfort and long-term dental health
